settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences
settings.brandingSectionDescription: Customize the navigation logo area at the top of the sidebar. Preferences are stored in this browser only.
settings.brandingDisplayNameDescription: Shown next to the icon in the navigation logo area (stored in this browser only).
settings.brandFontDescription: Choose the typography used for the sidebar brand, including a more expressive handwritten style.
settings.brandingIconDescription: Square image; resized to 64×64 and saved locally.
settings.brandingIconTooLarge: Icon is too large after processing. Try a smaller image.
settings.brandingBackdropDescription: Background of the sidebar logo stage. “Time-based” follows your local hour.
settings.brandingResetDescription: Restore default name, icon, and backdrop.
settings.emailNotificationsDescription: Receive email updates for important events
settings.taskNotificationsDescription: Notify when tasks complete or fail
settings.createKeyDescription: Create a new API key for external integrations
settings.keyCreatedWarning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
settings.confirmDeleteKey: Delete this API key? This cannot be undone.
settings.logoutSessionDescription: Sign out on this browser. You can sign in again anytime.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
settings.pluginsCardDesc: Install optional features (browser automation, office documents, RAG).
settings.pluginsEmpty: Could not load the extension catalog.
settings.pluginsPlaywrightInstallWarn: Python package installed, but Playwright browser download failed. Set PLAYWRIGHT_DOWNLOAD_HOST or LEAGENT_PLAYWRIGHT_MIRROR=1, then reinstall or run: uv run --directory backend playwright install chromium
settings.tokensDesc: Writes secrets and provider config values to ~/.leagent/.env on this machine; existing secrets are never shown. Enter a new value and save to overwrite; use Clear to remove a key. A GitHub token raises API limits for the skills hub.
settings.tokensWebSearchProvider: Web search provider (WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER: duckduckgo_lite | searxng | bing)
settings.tokensWebSearchBing: Bing Web Search API key (WEB_SEARCH_BING_API_KEY; use with provider bing)
settings.tokensWebSearchSearxng: SearXNG base URL (WEB_SEARCH_SEARXNG_BASE_URL; use with provider searxng)
settings.tokensWebFetchInterval: Min ms between requests to same host (WEB_FETCH_MIN_INTERVAL_MS)
settings.mailDesc: Writes SMTP credentials to ~/.leagent/.env on this machine (same mechanism as Environment secrets) so tools like email_send can omit the server when these defaults are set. Passwords are never shown; they are updated only when you enter a new password.
settings.mailUsernamePlaceholder: Leave blank on save to keep the stored username unchanged
settings.mailUsernameStored: A username is already stored; enter above to overwrite.
settings.mailPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current saved password
settings.mailPasswordStored: A password is stored. Enter a new one to overwrite, or clear below.
settings.mailTestToPlaceholder: Optional; leave empty to verify login and TLS only
settings.pythonPackagesDesc: Install or remove PyPI packages in the environment used by this backend process. Some changes require a backend restart before already-imported modules pick them up.
settings.pythonPackagesEmpty: No packages loaded, or the environment could not be read.
settings.pythonPackagesInstallHint: Enter a package name or version constraint, then click Install.
settings.pythonPackagesNoOutdated: All packages are up to date.
settings.pythonPackagesConfirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}?
settings.passwordRequired: Please fill in all password fields
settings.passwordChangedRelogin: Please sign in again with your new password.
settings.toolsTabCardDesc: Enable or disable tools available in workflows
settings.scheduleErrorLoading: Could not load scheduled tasks. Please try again.
settings.scheduleNoFlowsHint: No workflows yet — create one in the Workflows page first.
settings.scheduleDefaultActiveHint: Saved tasks are enabled (active) by default. You can pause or trigger them from the list.
settings.scheduleErrorFlowRequired: Please select a workflow to run
settings.scheduleErrorCronInvalid: Cron expression is invalid (needs at least 5 fields)
settings.defaultModelDesc: Choose the default model for chat and workflows
settings.providerCardDesc: Overview of enabled AI model providers
settings.noProvidersHint: Go to the admin page to add OpenAI, Qwen, and other providers
settings.streamingDesc: Stream AI responses token by token
settings.cronHint: Format: minute hour day month weekday (e.g. 0 9 * * * is daily at 9:00)

webSearch.name: Web search
webSearch.description: Fetch web content via search engines

fileRead.name: File read
fileRead.description: Read local or remote file contents
